# Dual Test Reports

Every test run produces two reports.

## Report 1: HTML (Playwright built-in)

Automatically generated at `playwright/reports/`. View with:
```bash
cd app && pnpm test:e2e:report
```

## Report 2: Markdown (generated by script)

Use `generate-report.js` to create the markdown report:

```bash
echo '{
  "pageName": "project-list",
  "pageNameZh": "專案列表",
  "testDate": "2026-03-19",
  "testUrl": "http://localhost:5173/projects",
  "testAccount": "sysadmin (系統管理員 權限)",
  "describeGroups": [
    {
      "name": "Create Project",
      "tests": [
        { "name": "should create project", "status": "pass", "description": "建立專案" },
        { "name": "should handle error", "status": "fail", "description": "錯誤處理",
          "error": { "file": "tests/e2e/projects/project-list.spec.ts", "line": 42, "message": "Timeout", "classification": "NON-RECOVERABLE", "suggestion": "增加 timeout" } }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputDir": "playwright/reports/project-list"
}' | node $SKILL_DIR/scripts/generate-report.js
```

Output: `{ "outputPath": "playwright/reports/project-list/test-report.md", "summary": { "total": 2, "pass": 1, "fail": 1, "skip": 0, "passRate": 50 } }`

### Key Rules

- Use 繁體中文 for report content
- One table per `test.describe` group
- Filename format: `playwright/reports/{page-name}/test-report.md` (no date in filename)
- Always overwrite previous report (no accumulation)
- Reference the style from existing reports in `playwright/` directory
